Atty. JESSICA TAYLOR, Esq. of Fisher & Phillips LLP (tel: 415-490-9000) for Defendant Rocket Lawyer, Inc.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MONIQUE COVINGTION's Motion To Compel Defendant Charley Moores Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions, Special Interrogatories, And Form Interrogatories.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court notes the motion to compel arbitration was granted by Judge Richard Ulmer. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

If the motion to compel arbitration is granted, this motion to compel discovery will be DENIED.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order and email to the Judge Pro Tem.
